infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Roam uses your location to pin experiences exactly where they happened.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Roam uses your camera to add real photos to your memories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Roam accesses your photo library to attach images to experiences.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Roam saves photos from your memories to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Roam uses your camera to add photos to memories.
